scripts.dev: sh -c 'for pid in $(lsof -nP -iTCP:5177 -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; exec node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js --clearScreen false --logLevel info'
scripts.dev:fresh: npm install && rm -rf node_modules/.vite && sh -c 'for pid in $(lsof -nP -iTCP:5177 -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; exec node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js --clearScreen false --logLevel info'
scripts.start: sh -c 'for pid in $(lsof -nP -iTCP:5177 -sTCP:LISTEN -t 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; exec node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js --clearScreen false --logLevel info'
scripts.check:api: sh -c 'echo "→ GET http://localhost:8000/docs (3s timeout)"; curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -w "  HTTP %{http_code}\n" http://localhost:8000/docs || { echo "→ GET http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs"; curl -sS -m 3 -o /dev/null -w "  HTTP %{http_code}\n" http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs; }'
